# Support

## Before Opening an Issue

1. Check the [Troubleshooting Guide](../docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md)
2. Search [existing issues](https://github.com/RajwanYair/ExplorerLens.io/issues)
3. Review the [CHANGELOG](../CHANGELOG.md) — your issue may be fixed in a newer version

## How to Get Help

| Problem | Where to go |
| --------- | ------------ |
| Bug or crash | [Open a Bug Report](https://github.com/RajwanYair/ExplorerLens.io/issues/new?template=bug_report.md) |
| Build failure | [Open a Build Issue](https://github.com/RajwanYair/ExplorerLens.io/issues/new?template=build_issue.yml) |
| Feature request | [Open a Feature Request](https://github.com/RajwanYair/ExplorerLens.io/issues/new?template=feature_request.md) |
| New format/plugin | [Open a Plugin Request](https://github.com/RajwanYair/ExplorerLens.io/issues/new?template=plugin_request.yml) |
| Security vulnerability | [Private security report](https://github.com/RajwanYair/ExplorerLens.io/security/advisories/new) – **never use public issues** |
| Performance problem | [Open a Performance Issue](https://github.com/RajwanYair/ExplorerLens.io/issues/new?template=performance_issue.md) |

## Response Times

| Severity | Target |
| ---------- | -------- |
| Security (critical) | 48 hours |
| Build failures | 72 hours |
| Bugs | 1 week |
| Feature requests | Reviewed during sprint planning |
